versionFlag.description: CLI --version flag that prints the current RAPID version from package.json

RAPID_VERSION_ENV.description: Version string persisted in user .env alongside RAPID_TOOLS path

versionCheck.signature: (installed: string, current: string) => { needsUpdate: boolean, installed: string, current: string }
versionCheck.description: Compares installed version against current package.json version using existing compareVersions()

version-from-package-json.description: The version value must always be read from package.json at runtime, never hardcoded
